design_philosophy: An intelligent daily operating system for life. Calming, luxurious, and addictive in a healthy way. Fuses organic warmth (sand, stone, sage) with architectural precision to outperform competitors like Sunsama and Notion Calendar.

global_rules.test_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
global_rules.anti_ai_patterns: NO purple/violet gradients. NO generic Inter/Roboto for headings. NO centered uniform layouts. Prioritize asymmetry and tension in marketing, and modular density in dashboards.
global_rules.accessibility: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast for small text. Hover/focus states must be distinct.

rules.anti_default: Never use default bold for everything. Use font-light for elegance or font-black for structural impact.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (2-3x normal). Use p-6, p-8, p-12.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Bento Grid Mode A: Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical grid-cols-12, gap-8. Mix tall, wide, and square shapes. Leave intentional negative space.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid Mode B: Dense but calm. grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12. gap-6. All pixels utilized, uniform bottom alignment for rows.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Architectural corners. Parent containers rounded-2xl, inner cards rounded-xl. Buttons rounded-full or rounded-lg depending on context.

surfaces.glassmorphism: Only for sticky nav or focus mode. Light: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/40. Dark: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10.
surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, NO default shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg.

motion.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly, backgrounds darken slightly. Text color explicitly set on hover.

components.buttons: Primary: Solid brand color (Terracotta) with white text. Secondary: Outline with border-stone-200 and text-primary.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. 1px border. Focus: ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-brand_primary.
components.navigation: Header must have glassmorphism background. Desktop links must be fully visible. Clean logo.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn charts. Use brand_primary and brand_secondary for lines/bars. No default colors.

screens.landing_hero: Bento layout hero. Left side: Massive H1 (Cabinet Grotesk), emotive subtitle, Primary CTA. Right side: Asymmetrical image grid showing UI mockups + 'hero_workspace' image. Use 'abstract_brand_art' as subtle floating elements.
screens.today_dashboard: The emotional center. Sidebar nav (collapsible). Top left: 'North Star' focus metric. Main area: 3 columns. Col 1: Habit check-ins & Energy state. Col 2: Today's Priorities (AI sorted). Col 3: Calendar schedule. Calm white cards on off-white background.
screens.focus_mode: Immersive, cinematic, fullscreen. 'focus_mode_bg' image with 50% opacity black/white overlay. Central large timer (Pomodoro). Current task in massive elegant typography. Ambient UI (hide everything else).
screens.tasks: Modular list view. Progressive disclosure (hide details until clicked). Priorities marked by subtle color tags. AI auto-prioritize button (shimmering Aceternity border style).
screens.calendar: Week/Day views. Drag-drop functionality. Focus blocks appear with striped or solid Terracotta backgrounds. Grid lines very subtle (border-opacity-30).
screens.weekly_review: Step-by-step modal flow. Step 1: Wins (Confetti/Success animations). Step 2: Unfinished tasks (Move or Delete). Step 3: AI Reflection (Insights in conversational UI). Step 4: Next week planning.
screens.pricing: 3 tiers (Free, Pro $5, Elite $15). Elite tier uses 'Luxury' styling (darker card, glowing border, 'Tracing Beam' effect). Pro is highlighted. Clear comparison table below.

hero_workspace.description: Wide-angle photograph of a serene, minimalist wooden desk bathed in soft morning sunlight.
hero_workspace.usage: Landing page hero section background or main feature image.

focus_mode_bg.description: Abstract, blurred warm light filtering through linen fabric.
focus_mode_bg.usage: Immersive background for the Focus Mode screen.

abstract_brand_art.description: Minimalist abstract 3D geometric shapes in warm sand and stone colors.
abstract_brand_art.usage: Landing page decorative elements or feature cards background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the typography pairing: Cabinet Grotesk for Headings, Manrope for Body. Install these via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Do NOT use default Inter font.
Implement the Light mode color palette as the default. Use the exact hex codes provided for backgrounds, surfaces, and accents.
For the Landing page, do not use Shadcn layout components. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for bento grids to achieve asymmetry.
For the Dashboard, use heavily customized Shadcn components (1px borders, flat colors, no Vercel default shadows).
Ensure all images are implemented using the exact URLs from the media section. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for QA.
Build the dashboard to feel like a high-end command center: dense but with clear negative space, utilizing the full grid width.
